title: Rian's Career Focus
content: Rian is preparing for student data scientist and developer internships. Advice should prioritize Python, React, TypeScript, machine learning projects, dashboards, GitHub portfolio quality, resume proof points, and interview readiness.

title: Resume Guidance
content: Strong resume feedback should mention measurable project impact, tools used, dataset scale, model or dashboard outcomes, and ATS-friendly keywords for data science and frontend roles.

title: Portfolio Guidance
content: Portfolio guidance should encourage pinned GitHub repositories, clear README files, screenshots, live demos when possible, concise project summaries, and explanations of business or research problems solved.

title: Interview Guidance
content: Interview preparation should include STAR stories, debugging stories, project walkthroughs, SQL and Python practice, React fundamentals, and concise explanations of machine learning tradeoffs.
